prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为：2021年约2773名、2022年约2855名、2023年约3652名、2024年约2561名、2025年约3561名。整体呈现较大波动，2023年因全国性断档现象位次大幅后移至3652名，2024年迅速回升至2561名，2025年再次后移至3561名。近两年波动幅度约1000名，2025年基准位次约3561名；南开大学在天津市本科批招生计划：2021年525人、2022年534人、2023年550人、2024年567人、2025年570人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势。2026年计划为543人，较2025年减少27人，缩招约4.74%，缩招将加剧竞争，有利于位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第21名（2025年第23名、2024年第21名、2023年第20名），稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对考生有持续强吸引力；2026年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端（生科院院长论文造假被免职、多位教师被举报）及不为专硕提供宿舍等事件，可能对部分考生的报考意愿产生一定抑制作用。抖音热度为"较热"，总排名第36位，综合热度约128万，有一定社会关注度。2022年曾在河南出现投档线断档，但天津本地未见明显异常；第五轮学科评估中，南开大学拥有化学A+、数学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+等4个A+学科，以及中国语言文学A、物理学A、生物学A、统计学A、马克思主义理论A、理论经济学A、政治学A、世界史A、中国史A等9个A学科，环境科学与工程A-，共14个A-及以上学科，学科实力极为雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与南开大学工科试验班（信息科学与技术、卓越拔尖伯苓班）等招生专业高度契合；金融/财经/经济类专业呈分化观望态势。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约14%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧将推动位次前移。2026年；南开大学位于天津市，为本市唯一一所综合类985高校，对本市考生具有天然的地域亲和力。2025年在津招生570人，占当年全国招生计划较大比例，本地生源倾斜明显。2026年缩招至543人，本地考生竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次3561名，2026年招生计划缩招27人（-4.74%）及天津市考生总数增加约14%均加剧竞争，推动位次前移；但2026年声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热情，产生反向拉力。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约3410名，较2025年前移约151名。波动区间考虑学校层次（Top21，比例上限≤12%）及优势学科数量（≥10个可略收窄），半宽取约389名，区间为3021–3799名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）
- 金融学类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）
- 经济学类
- 法学
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（物质科学与可持续发展）
- 中国语言文学类
- 公共管理类
- 历史学类
- 哲学类。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3021–3799名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次优于区间下限（<3021名），可重点冲击一档的卓越拔尖计划伯苓班和数学与大数据试验班；若位次接近区间上限（>3799名），建议以三档专业为主，争取进入南开大学后再通过大类分流或转专业调整。南开大学实行大类招生，专业任选政策降低了专业调剂风险，考生可优先选择心仪的大类方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were: approximately 2773 in 2021, 2855 in 2022, 3652 in 2023, 2561 in 2024, and 3561 in 2025. Overall, there is significant fluctuation. In 2023, due to a nationwide gap phenomenon, the ranking dropped sharply to 3652, quickly rebounding to 2561 in 2024, and then falling again to 3561 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 1000 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 3561 in 2025. Nankai University's undergraduate batch enrollment plan in Tianjin: 525 in 2021, 534 in 2022, 550 in 2023, 567 in 2024, and 570 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 543, a decrease of 27 from 2025, a reduction of about 4.74%. This reduction will intensify competition, favoring a forward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 21st on the main list (23rd in 2025, 21st in 2024, 20th in 2023), firmly among the top universities in the country, exerting a sustained strong attraction for candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct (the dean of the School of Life Sciences was dismissed for paper fabrication, multiple faculty members were reported) and the failure to provide dormitories for professional master's students, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot', ranking 36th overall, with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.28 million, indicating a certain level of social attention. In 2022, there was a cutoff line gap in Henan, but no obvious anomaly was seen locally in Tianjin. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nankai University has 4 A+ disciplines: Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, and Applied Economics A+, as well as 9 A disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A, Physics A, Biology A, Statistics A, Marxist Theory A, Theoretical Economics A, Political Science A, World History A, and Chinese History A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-, totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Nankai University's engineering experimental classes (Information Science and Technology, Outstanding Top-notch Boling Class). Finance/Finance and Economics majors show a trend of differentiation and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool, intensifying competition and pushing rankings forward. In 2026, Nankai University is located in Tianjin, the only comprehensive 985 university in the city, naturally having regional affinity for local candidates. In 2025, it enrolled 570 students in Tianjin, accounting for a large proportion of the national enrollment plan that year, with a clear local student bias. In 2026, enrollment is reduced to 543, further intensifying competition among local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering all factors: the baseline ranking in 2025 is 3561, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 27 students (-4.74%) and the increase in Tianjin candidates by about 14% both intensify competition, pushing the ranking forward; however, the negative reputation events in 2026 may suppress some application enthusiasm, creating a reverse pull. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 3410, a forward shift of about 151 places from 2025. Considering the fluctuation range based on school level (Top 21, upper limit ≤12%) and the number of advantageous disciplines (≥10 can slightly narrow), the half-width is about 389 places, with a range of 3021–3799.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Outstanding Top-notch Plan Boling Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering)
- Economics
- Law
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science and Sustainable Development)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Public Administration
- History
- Philosophy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 3021–3799, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<3021), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as the Outstanding Top-notch Plan Boling Class and the Mathematics and Big Data Experimental Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3799), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, striving to enter Nankai University first and then adjust through major streaming or transfer. Nankai University implements major-based enrollment with a policy of free choice of majors, reducing the risk of major adjustment, allowing candidates to prioritize their preferred major direction.
